title: Dnipro: Explosions reported
description: Update: Massive Russian missile, drone attack on Kyiv, Dnipro damages residential buildings, kills 5, injures 27. At least five people were killed and 16 injured after multiple residential buildings were struck by missiles and drones in Dnipro amid the large-scale Russian attack overnight on June 2. Additional waves of explosions were heard in Kyiv around 4 a.m. local time, as officials said that...

title: Kyiv: 4 injured
description: At least 4 injured in large-scale missile, drone attack on Kyiv. At least four people have suffered injuries in a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight on June 2, officials reported. Residents of Kyiv have been bracing for another attack for days following intelligence reports that Moscow was preparing another strike on the capital

title: 32 missiles
description: The monitoring public reports several bad signals at once on this night. The activity of the strategic aviation control points of the Russian Federation is recorded (it's a pity that Pautina did not finish all of them). It is also reported about the increased threat of using Kh-22/Kh-32 missiles from Tu-22M3 onboard. Our common task with you is to take care of your safety.
description_en: The monitoring public reports several bad signals at once on this night. The activity of the strategic aviation control points of the Russian Federation is recorded (it's a pity that Pautina did not finish all of them). It is also reported about the increased threat of using Kh-22/Kh-32 missiles from Tu-22M3 onboard. Our common task with you is to take care of your safety.
description_uk: Мониторинговые паблики сообщают сразу несколько плохих сигналов на эту ночь Зафиксирована активность пунктов управления стратегической авиации рф (как жаль, что «Паутина» добила не всю). Также сообщается о повышенной угрозе применения ракет Х-22/Х-32 с бортов Ту-22М3. Наша общая с вами задача — позаботиться о своей безопасности.

title: Missile launch detected
description: Russian Federation cannot afford to launch "Iskander" every day, - "Flash" According to the adviser to the Minister of Defense Sergei Beskrestnov, the Russians produce about 60 "Iskander-M" missiles a month, and this is not enough for daily massive strikes. title: Attack attack on infrastructure
description: Ukrainian Railways reports Q1 loss of US$178m: what were the contributing factors? Ukrzaliznytsia (Ukrainian Railways) has reported a loss of about UAH 7.9 billion (US$178 million) for the first quarter of 2026 due to constant Russian attacks on infrastructure and soaring energy prices. title: 270 drones
description: VAKS arrested an official of the State Security Service of Ukraine and a drone manufacturer in the case of a $1 million bribe. According to the investigation, the representative of the State Border Service and the owner of the UAV production company demanded money from the winner of the tender for the supply of 270 drones worth UAH 760 million for the "unimpeded" conclusion and execution of the contract. An official of the General State University was sent to custody with the possibility of a bail of UAH 4 million, an entrepreneur...

Чиновника ГПСУ отправили под стражу с возможностью залога в 4 млн грн, предпринимателя...

title: 200 missiles + 000 drones intercepted
description: More than 8,000 drones per month — Russia has set a new record for air attacks on Ukraine. AFP writes that in May, Russia launched 8,150 drones and more than 200 missiles over Ukraine. This is 24% more than in April, which was also a record. At the same time, Ukrainian air defense and mobile groups, according to the Air Force, intercepted 91% of Russian drones and missiles. The agency also notes that Russians all...
description_en: More than 8,000 drones per month — Russia has set a new record for air attacks on Ukraine. AFP writes that in May, Russia launched 8,150 drones and more than 200 missiles over Ukraine. This is 24% more than in April, which was also a record. At the same time, Ukrainian air defense and mobile groups, according to the Air Force, intercepted 91% of Russian drones and missiles. The agency also notes that Russians all...
description_uk: Более 8 тысяч дронов за месяц — россия установила новый рекорд воздушных атак по Украине AFP пишет, что в мае русня запустила по Украине 8150 беспилотников и более 200 ракет. Это на 24% больше, чем в апреле, который также был рекордным. При этом украинская ПВО и мобильные группы, по данным Воздушных сил, перехватили 91% российских дронов и ракет. В агентстве также отмечают, что россияне все...
